name: Pickled Jalapenos

What the Batch size? 
5-6 Jalapenos and 2-3 Serranos

-scale and prepare all ingredients 

-beat eggs seperately 

-mix all ingredients in a large bowl 

-cool and hold for service

name: House Sazon
notes: need to add lawry seasoning to system

instructions.text:
• ﻿in large sauce pan melt butter to liquid
    • ﻿whisk in brown sugar and salt n pepper
    • scale graham crackers into large mixing bowl
    • ﻿add the butter liquid to graham cracker crumbles
    • ﻿mix buy hand or spatula being sure all ingredients are incorporated well
    • ﻿place in smaller pan/wrap in plastic/hold for service

• ﻿scale out ingredients in large stock pot
    • ﻿bring to a boil
    • ﻿add vegetables
    • ﻿cook for five minutes
    • ﻿strain vegetables from liquid
    • ﻿cover vegetables with liquid
    • ﻿cool and hold for service
    • ﻿reserve remaining liquid for pickled vegetables and jalapenos

- roast garlic and jalapeno
